channel.title: recent_thoughts
channel.description: I write about how I use python and linux in data science.

item.title: 💭 Fork Around And Find Out | Remaining Authentic In Retirement With Kelsey Hightower
item.description: What a great first guest for FAFO. Kelsey is always such a great listen. He talks about killedbygoogle and how enginee

item.title: 💭 Slash Pages
item.description: A nice list of slashpages you might want to consider including / aliasing / 301ing. These feel like nice things to setup
